title: Verify 'Cancel Anyway' triggers Incentive Offer pop-up (when enabled)
description: Test that proceeding with cancellation triggers the discount offer pop-up when it's enabled via backend.
preconditions: The incentive offer is enabled in the backend

steps.description: 2. On the Loss Aversion pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.

expected_result: A new pop-up appears with the discount offer, e.g., 'Lock in 50% off your first month now.' The offer title and price are displayed as configured in the backend.
